reviews.review_description: Some notes: what is the code of room 35??😅 Very mysterious. For the rest, nice game full of interesting ideas and good physics, which brings some problems if put under stress. The first celle is almost impossible to jump on the pink columns. The game could use a little more care: a little plot, some music, a little blood... With these things, it could also be on the official store for 15 euros.
Like a saw themed escape room

developer_response.body: Thank you very much ! We are glad you liked our game. It means a lot
